tasks.name: battle-resolver
tasks.description: Activate pending battles with 2 participants; resolve active battles past end time and pay out winners

tasks.name: pnl-leaderboard
tasks.description: Recompute per-trader realized PnL aggregates (daily/weekly/monthly/all-time) and upsert pnlLeaderboard rows every 15 minutes

tasks.name: liquidation-detect
tasks.description: Detect Phoenix liquidations by diffing each trader's open positions against the previous snapshot (collateral-collapse discriminator + two-tick confirmation), record liquidation events, and notify followers + the trader every 5 minutes

tasks.name: monthly-reward-finalize
tasks.description: On the first run after a calendar-month boundary, finalize the prior month's prize pot (idempotent): pick top-3 monthly PnL traders, snapshot the pot composition, and pre-create per-winner rank-split claim allotments. Skips if already finalized, fewer than 3 ranked traders, or an empty pot.
